title: chlorocyperus glomeratus
intro: Chlorocyperus glomeratus, also known as Sensitive Grass or Sensitive Cyperus, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family. It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties. The plant is used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Chlorocyperus glomeratus include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to promote wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and soothe skin irritations.
